data.title: Reddit stock named top 2026 pick due to thriving ad business and content licensing for AI, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Reddit's stock is expected to perform well due to its rapidly expanding ad business and capacity to license content for artificial intelligence applications. Analysts have identified Reddit as a top pick for 2026, emphasizing its competitive edge in these areas.

data.title: Analysts believe Apple will enter AI in early 2026. Anticipation grows as Apple stock rises.
data.description: Experts analyzing Apple's stock predict that the renowned tech company will make its foray into the world of artificial intelligence in the beginning of 2026. This potential move has generated anticipation among investors and tech enthusiasts alike. The transition is expected to mark a significant milestone for Apple as it catches up with competitors in the rapidly evolving AI market. The announcement has sparked interest in the industry, with many eying Apple's progress as it gears up to embrace this new era of technology.

data.title: TemVideo launches AI video platform for creating 45 to 90-second high-converting videos, revolutionizing marketing.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, TemVideo, the cutting-edge AI video platform, was introduced, marking a significant advancement in the realm of long-form marketing video production. Tailored for crafting compelling 45 to 90-second videos that drive conversion rates, TemVideo offers businesses a solution for creating narrative-focused content. This launch is set to redefine video marketing tactics with its innovative approach.

data.title: Skywork.ai unveils Skywork, an AI workspace integrating specialized AI agents for multimodal productivity.
data.description: In Singapore on December 23, 2025, Skywork.ai, a company specializing in AI technology for the workplace, announced its revolutionary product, Skywork. This innovative platform combines a range of specialized AI agents to enhance productivity in a multimodal fashion. Unlike traditional single-purpose AI tools, Skywork integrates various functionalities to streamline work processes.

data.title: Global Wireless Mesh Network Market forecasted to grow strongly by 2025-2032. Key components, types, technologies, applications, users, regions analyzed.
data.description: Dublin-based research firm ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released a report titled "Wireless Mesh Network Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032," emphasizing the increasing significance of wireless mesh networks in establishing robust digital infrastructure for enterprises. These networks offer flexibility and resilience, enabling leaders to deploy secure connectivity that aligns with their organizations' transformation goals. The report predicts a strong growth trajectory for the wireless mesh network market, reflecting the growing demand for adaptive communication solutions in the evolving business landscape.

data.title: ServiceNow acquires Armis for $7.75 billion in all-cash deal, expected to close in second half of 2026.
data.description: Shares of ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE: NOW) experienced a decline in trading on Tuesday after the company announced its acquisition of Armis for $7.75 billion in an all-cash deal. The acquisition, expected to be completed in the second half of 2026 pending regulatory approvals, will be funded through a combination of cash on hand and debt. ServiceNow disclosed having $2.73 billion in cash and cash equivalents as of September 30. The merger will see Armis' team integrating into ServiceNow’s operations. Armis specializes in cyber exposure and cyber-physical security, safeguarding IT, operational technology, medical devices, and critical enterprise environments.

data.title: Investors of Sprouts Farmers Market are being encouraged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP regarding losses suffered between June 4, 2025, and October 29, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Sprouts to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options. Investors who bought or obtained securities in Sprouts within the period of June 4, 2025, to October 29, 2025, are encouraged to contact him directly if they wish to explore further.

data.title: Türkiye's first AI-animated series "Oyun Avcıları" debuts on TRT Avaz with 18,000 visual assets and 60,000 seconds of footage.
data.description: In Ankara, Turkey, on December 23, 2025, the debut of "Game Hunters" took place on TRT Avaz, as the nation's initial animated series developed solely through artificial intelligence technology. The innovative venture involved the production of 18,000 visual elements and 60,000 seconds of video content.

data.title: Investors of Rezolute can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to discuss significant losses with Partner James Wilson.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who faced substantial losses in Rezolute to reach out to him for a consultation on their available options. If you experienced notable financial setbacks in Rezolute stocks or options and seek guidance on potential legal recourse, Wilson is available for direct contact. It is important for affected investors to consider discussing their situation with a legal professional to understand their rights and explore potential avenues for recourse.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for Bitdeer investors who suffered losses between June 6, 2024 and November 10, 2025. Contact James Wilson to discuss options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who incurred losses in Bitdeer to reach out to him for a consultation on their available options. If you bought or obtained securities in Bitdeer within the period of June 6, 2024, to November 10, 2025, and are interested in discussing further action regarding this, please contact him directly.

data.title: Fuel card market set to grow by $800 billion from 2025-2032 as organizations adopt digital solutions & compliance measures to enhance fleet operations.
data.description: Dublin - A report on the Fuel Card Market has been released, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market is experiencing significant changes as leaders adjust to digital advancements, regulatory challenges, and improved risk management. Companies are incorporating integrated technology and compliance tools to enhance efficiency and control across various fleet activities. The Fuel Card Market is projected to show substantial growth from 2025 to 2032. Key details include its size and the evolving nature of the market.
